name: OpenClaw Thread Context
description: Appends per-Slack-thread context to the system prompt via the before_prompt_build hook.

enabled.description: Master toggle. When false the engine behaves identically to legacy (no system-prompt addition).

contextDir.description: Directory holding per-thread context files (slack-thread-<thread_ts>.json) and/or threads.json. Relative paths resolve against the workspace dir.

useChannelSubFolder.description: When true, per-thread files are read from <contextDir>/<channelId>/ instead of directly under <contextDir>.
